# Relay

> Managed MCP server hosting — deploy MCP servers in minutes, not days.

Relay is a managed hosting platform for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It lets developers and teams deploy pre-built MCP server templates with zero infrastructure overhead. Pick a template, enter your API credentials, and get a live MCP endpoint URL that works with any MCP-compatible AI client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, ChatGPT, and more).

## Key Features

- One-click deployment of MCP servers from pre-built templates
- AES-256 encryption for all stored credentials
- Cloudflare Workers edge execution for low-latency global access
- Unlimited API calls on every server
- Real-time logs and usage analytics dashboard
- Per-tool toggles to enable/disable individual MCP tools
- Auto-generated client configuration (Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.)
- 90-day log retention

## Supported Integrations

- GitHub — manage repos, issues, PRs, and code search (12 tools)
- Notion — read and update pages, databases, and blocks (8 tools)
- Slack — send messages, search channels, manage threads (6 tools)
- Brave Search — web and local search with instant answers (3 tools)
- PostgreSQL — query databases, inspect schemas, run analytics (5 tools)
- Google Drive — search, read, and organize files and folders (7 tools)
- Linear — issue tracking and project management
- Jira — issue tracking and agile project management
- Airtable — database and spreadsheet management

## Pricing

$3 per server per month. Unlimited API calls. No per-request fees. Cancel anytime.
